stars.description: Fast state-of-the-art image and video segmentation in portable C/C++
stars.highlights: A fast, portable C/C++ implementation of state-of-the-art image and video segmentation, enabling efficient segmentation tasks without heavy dependencies. It provides real-time performance for both images and videos with tracking capabilities.
stars.worthReading: For developers needing high-performance segmentation in resource-constrained environments or wanting to integrate segmentation into C/C++ applications without Python overhead.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness: moderate (young repo with rising traction from notable starrer); Relevance: high (state-of-the-art image/video segmentation is frontier AI); Concreteness: moderate (concrete implementation but not novel approach)

interestSummary: They remain focused on efficient, portable C/C++ implementations of AI models, as evidenced by their interest in a fast segmentation library.
